subject: Re: Fwd: From Msg Sheet
body:
either


----- Original Message ----
From: Darren <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeffrey epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Cc: Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; Larry Visoski <lvjet@aol.com>
Sent: Friday, November 2, 2007 9:11:38 AM
Subject: Fwd: From Msg Sheet


Still for sale.  Been listed for more than a year.  Current listing price is $375,000.  Owner claims he is in discussions with two other parties but has no firm comittment.  Isn't it funny how there are always other buyers when we express interest.  Boat is still in puerto RICO.  Who do you want to see it?  Bruce?  Carlos?  Please advise.

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:


From: hkim@nysgmail.com (helen)
Date: November 2, 2007 9:13:27 AM EDT
To: dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: From Msg Sheet


From: April Taken by: HELEN on 11/02/2007
Phone# 561 272 7760

Returning your call in regards to a boat you had interest in.  Yes, it is still for sale.

** End of Message

=
body_html:
either

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Assuming that this case is like most others where
> the Form 4 filing is due  
> two business days after this event, that would make
> the filing due today.  
>  
> Just wanted you to know that Doug Williams waited
> until practically the end  
> of the day to let us know about this option grant.
>  
> I asked Doug for the details on the options; Peg is
> checking with another  
> source and I have already called Howard. 
> Unfortunately, Howard is in a  meeting 
> and I have to wait until Howard calls me back.
>  
> Darren

t
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Assuming that this case is like most others where
the Form 4 filing is due
two business days after this event, that would make
the filing due today.

Just wanted you to know that Doug Williams waited
until practically the end
of the day to let us know about this option grant.

I asked Doug for the details on the options; Peg is
checking with another
source and I have already called Howard.
Unfortunately, Howard is in a meeting
and I have to wait until Howard calls me back.

Darren

To: dkiesq@aol.com
From: akarll@nysgmail.com (amanda)
Subject: From Msg Sheet
Date: 4 Apr 2006 17:06:01 -0400

From: Doug Williams Taken by: AMANDA on 04/04/2006
Phone# 614 415-1652

I wanted to make sure you knew that the company
awarded Les 82,500 options on 3/31 and that they
need to be reported.

** End of Message

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

Should I be involved in helping this or not? Your
thoughts?

I am having Lucy Sykes, Ann Dexter-Jones and Anna
Rhodes help me
host an event to launch Steven Victor's new
skincare line, this
coming December or January and would love to have
you on as the 4th
host. I am looking to have a gathering of 30 or so
women attend the
launch at Lever House, The Core Club or Daniel...
Let me know if
you'd be interested. Thanks.
